jobs.title: Quality Manager 80 - 100 % (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Getreu der Vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives" liefern die Hamilton Unternehmen seit 1950 Lösungen für die Gesundheitsbranche. Wir sind ein innovativer Vorreiter was Beatmungsgeräte, das automatisierte Pipettieren und Lagern von Proben sowie die Entwicklung von Prozesssensoren anbelangt. Die Business Unit Process Analytics entwickelt, produziert und vertreibt modernste Prozessmesstechnik für Kunden in Biopharma, Chemie und Brauereien. Unser Produktportfolio umfasst Sensoren für kritische Prozessparameter wie den pH-Wert, Sauerstoff, oder auch Sensoren zur Messung der Zelldichte, wie sie in biologischen Prozessen enorm wichtig und mit ihrer innovativen Technologie weltweit einzigartig sind. Das kannst du bewirken : Hauptaufgaben Prozessorientierte Umsetzung von Qualitätsanforderungen basierend auf den geltenden Normen, Regulierungen und Gesetzen sowie der gestellten Kundenanforderungen Anfertigung von Risikobewertungen Vorbereitung, Durchführung und Nachbereitung von Audits (interne Audits, Behördenaudit, Kundenaudits) Erledigung von allgemeinen Qualitätssicherungsaufgaben, z.B. Bearbeitung von Qualitätssicherungsvereinbarungen mit Kunden, Bewertung von Prüfplänen u.a. Erstellung und Pflege von Qualitätsdokumentationen (interne Richtlinien, Arbeitsanweisungen, usw.) in Zusammenarbeit mit den jeweiligen Prozesseigentümern Evaluation und Dokumentation von Abweichungen sowie Einleitung, Verfolgung und wo sinnvoll Übernahme der Leitung der daraus resultierenden Massnahmen Mitarbeit in internen fachübergreifenden Gremien Durchführung von Schulungen im Fachgebiet Qualität für alle technischen Fachbereiche (z.B. Entwicklung, Produktion, Technischer Support, usw.) Nebenaufgaben Systematische Betreuung und teilweise fachliche Leitung von Fachexperten-Teams bei Ursachenanalysen, Lösungsfindungen und Wirksamkeitsprüfungen Hilfestellungen an verschiedene Fachbereiche bei qualitätsverwandten Themen, z.B. Einhaltung von ISO Normen, länderspezifischen Zulassungen, usw. Das bringst du mit : Gutes Verständnis für Kunden- und Behördenbedürfnisse und Übertragung in Prozesse und Abläufe Erste Berufserfahrung in der Qualitätssicherung, Qualitätsmanagement oder ähnlichem Umfeld, GxP Erfahrungen sind ein Plus Naturwissenschaftlich-technische oder elektrotechnische Ausbildung/Studium oder vergleichbar Auf Grund des internationalen Teams werden nebst Deutsch, sehr gute Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift (mind. Level B2) vorausgesetzt Strukturierte und methodische Arbeitsweise und flexibler, toleranter und sachlicher Umgang mit externen sowie internen Ansprechpersonen Gewandter Umgang mit MS-Office (Word, Excel, Powerpoint) Initiative und kommunikative Persönlichkeit mit Hands-on Mentalität und kundenorientierten Lösungsansätzen Erfahre mehr über berufliche Möglichkeiten bei Hamilton unter jobs.hamilton.ch . Teilst du unsere Werte und fühlst du dich in einem kollegialen und bodenständigen Umfeld zu Hause? Bei Hamilton bieten wir nicht nur ein motivie

descriptionByLocale.it: Fedeli alla visione "Guidiamo l'innovazione per migliorare la vita delle persone", le aziende Hamilton forniscono soluzioni per il settore sanitario dal 1950. Siamo pionieri innovativi quando si tratta di ventilatori, pipettaggio e conservazione automatizzati di campioni e sviluppo di sensori di processo. La business unit Process Analytics sviluppa, produce e vende tecnologie di misurazione di processo all'avanguardia per clienti del settore biofarmaceutico, chimico e dei birrifici. Il nostro portafoglio di prodotti comprende sensori per parametri di processo critici come valore pH, ossigeno o sensori per la misurazione della densità cellulare, che sono estremamente importanti nei processi biologici e unici al mondo con la loro tecnologia innovativa. Questo è ciò che puoi fare: Compiti principali Implementazione orientata al processo dei requisiti di qualità sulla base delle norme, dei regolamenti e delle leggi applicabili, nonché dei requisiti del cliente Preparazione delle valutazioni dei rischi Preparazione, attuazione e follow-up degli audit (audit interni, audit delle autorità, audit dei clienti) Completamento di compiti generali di garanzia della qualità, ad es. elaborazione degli accordi di garanzia della qualità con i clienti, valutazione dei piani di prova, ecc. Creazione e aggiornamento della documentazione di qualità (linee guida interne, istruzioni di lavoro, ecc.) in collaborazione con i rispettivi proprietari dei processi Valutazione e documentazione delle deviazioni nonché avvio, monitoraggio e, se del caso, assunzione della gestione delle misure risultanti Partecipazione a comitati interdisciplinari interni Svolgimento di corsi di formazione nel campo della qualità per tutti i reparti tecnici (ad es. Sviluppo, produzione, supporto tecnico, ecc.) Compiti secondari Supporto sistematico e gestione tecnica parziale di team di esperti specializzati nell'analisi delle cause profonde, nella ricerca di soluzioni e nei test di efficacia Assistenza a vari dipartimenti su argomenti legati alla qualità, ad es. conformità con gli standard ISO, approvazioni specifiche per paese, ecc. Questo è ciò che porti con te: Buona comprensione delle esigenze del cliente e delle autorità e loro trasferimento in processi e procedure Prima esperienza professionale nel settore dell'assicurazione della qualità, della gestione della qualità o in un ambiente simile, l'esperienza GxP è un vantaggio Formazione/studi scientifico-tecnici o di ingegneria elettrica o comparabile Grazie al team internazionale, oltre al tedesco, è richiesta un'ottima conoscenza dell'inglese scritto e parlato (almeno livello B2) Modo di lavoro strutturato e metodico e rapporti flessibili, tolleranti e obiettivi con l'esterno e contatti interni Uso competente di MS Office (Word, Excel, Powerpoint) Personalità intraprendente e comunicativa con mentalità pratica e approcci di soluzione orientati al cliente Scopri di più sulle opportunità di carriera presso Hamilton su jobs.hamilton.ch. Condividi i nostri valori e ti senti a casa in un ambiente collegiale e con i piedi per terra? A Hamilton non offriamo solo motivi
descriptionByLocale.en: True to the vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", the Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative pioneer when it comes to ventilators, automated pipetting and storage of samples, and the development of process sensors. The Process Analytics business unit develops, produces and sells state-of-the-art process measurement technology for customers in biopharma, chemicals and breweries. Our product portfolio includes sensors for critical process parameters such as pH value, oxygen, or sensors for measuring cell density, which are extremely important in biological processes and unique worldwide with their innovative technology. This is what you can do: Main tasks Process-oriented implementation of quality requirements based on the applicable standards, regulations and laws as well as the customer requirements Preparation of risk assessments Preparation, implementation and follow-up of audits (internal audits, authority audits, customer audits) Completion of general quality assurance tasks, e.g. processing of quality assurance agreements with customers, evaluation of test plans, etc. Creation and maintenance of quality documentation (internal guidelines, work instructions, etc.) in collaboration with the respective process owners Evaluation and documentation of deviations as well as initiation, tracking and, where appropriate, taking over the management of the resulting measures Participation in internal interdisciplinary committees Carrying out training in the field of quality for all technical departments (e.g. Development, production, technical support, etc.) Secondary tasks Systematic support and partial technical management of teams of specialist experts in root cause analyses, solution finding and effectiveness testing Assistance to various departments on quality-related topics, e.g. compliance with ISO standards, country-specific approvals, etc. This is what you bring with you: Good understanding of customer and authority needs and transferring them into processes and procedures First professional experience in quality assurance, quality management or a similar environment, GxP experience is a plus Scientific-technical or electrical engineering training/studies or comparable Due to the international team, in addition to German, very good written and spoken English skills (at least level B2) are required Structured and methodical way of working and flexible, tolerant and objective dealings with external and internal contacts Proficient use of MS Office (Word, Excel, Powerpoint) Initiative and communicative personality with hands-on mentality and customer-oriented solution approaches Find out more about career opportunities at Hamilton at jobs.hamilton.ch . Do you share our values ​​and do you feel at home in a collegial and down-to-earth environment? At Hamilton we don't just offer a motivie
descriptionByLocale.fr: Fidèles à la vision « Nous encourageons l'innovation pour améliorer la vie des gens », les sociétés de Hamilton fournissent des solutions au secteur de la santé depuis 1950. Nous sommes un pionnier de l'innovation en matière de ventilateurs, de pipetage et de stockage automatisés d'échantillons, ainsi que de développement de capteurs de processus. L'unité commerciale Process Analytics développe, produit et vend une technologie de mesure de processus de pointe pour les clients des secteurs biopharmaceutique, chimique et brassicole. Notre gamme de produits comprend des capteurs pour les paramètres de processus critiques tels que la valeur du pH, l'oxygène ou des capteurs pour mesurer la densité cellulaire, qui sont extrêmement importants dans les processus biologiques et uniques au monde grâce à leur technologie innovante. Voici ce que vous pouvez faire : Tâches principales Mise en œuvre orientée processus des exigences de qualité sur la base des normes, réglementations et lois en vigueur ainsi que des exigences des clients Préparation des évaluations des risques Préparation, mise en œuvre et suivi des audits (audits internes, audits des autorités, audits des clients) Réalisation de tâches générales d'assurance qualité, par ex. traitement des accords d'assurance qualité avec les clients, évaluation des plans de test, etc. Création et maintenance de la documentation qualité (directives internes, instructions de travail, etc.) en collaboration avec les propriétaires de processus respectifs Évaluation et documentation des écarts ainsi que lancement, suivi et, le cas échéant, prise en charge de la gestion des mesures qui en résultent Participation à des comités interdisciplinaires internes Réalisation de formations dans le domaine de la qualité pour tous les services techniques (par ex. Développement, production, support technique, etc.) Tâches secondaires Soutien systématique et gestion technique partielle d'équipes d'experts spécialisés dans l'analyse des causes profondes, la recherche de solutions et les tests d'efficacité Assistance à divers départements sur des sujets liés à la qualité, par ex. conformité aux normes ISO, homologations spécifiques au pays, etc. Voici ce que vous apportez : Bonne compréhension des besoins des clients et des autorités et leur transfert dans les processus et procédures. Première expérience professionnelle dans l'assurance qualité, la gestion de la qualité ou un environnement similaire, une expérience GxP est un plus. Formation/études scientifiques, techniques ou en génie électrique ou comparable. En raison de l'équipe internationale, outre l'allemand, de très bonnes compétences en anglais écrit et parlé (au moins niveau B2) sont requises. Manière de travailler structurée et méthodique et dans les relations flexibles, tolérantes et objectives avec l'extérieur. et contacts internes Maîtrise de MS Office (Word, Excel, Powerpoint) Initiative et personnalité communicative avec une mentalité pratique et des approches de solutions orientées client. Pour en savoir plus sur les opportunités de carrière chez Hamilton, visitez jobs.hamilton.ch. Vous partagez nos valeurs et vous vous sentez chez vous dans un environnement collégial et terre-à-terre ? Chez Hamilton, nous n'offrons pas seulement une motivation

jobs.title: Projektleitung für Produktentwicklung 80 - 100 % (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Getreu der Vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives" liefern die Hamilton Unternehmen seit 1950 Lösungen für die Gesundheitsbranche. Wir sind ein innovativer Vorreiter was Beatmungsgeräte, das automatisierte Pipettieren und Lagern von Proben sowie die Entwicklung von Prozesssensoren anbelangt. Die Business Unit Process Analytics entwickelt, produziert und vertreibt modernste Prozessmesstechnik für Kunden in Biopharma, Chemie und Brauereien. Unser Produktportfolio umfasst Sensoren für kritische Prozessparameter wie den pH-Wert, Sauerstoff, oder auch Sensoren zur Messung der Zelldichte, wie sie in biologischen Prozessen enorm wichtig und mit ihrer innovativen Technologie weltweit einzigartig sind. Das kannst du bewirken : In deiner Rolle in der Projektleitung befindest du dich im Zentrum interdisziplinärer Teams aus Forschung Entwicklung, Prozessentwicklung und Produktmanagement. Gemeinsam mit deinem Team verantwortest du die erfolgreiche Umsetzung unserer Innovationsprojekte von der ersten Idee bis hin zur Marktreife. Du leitest anspruchsvolle Produktentwicklungsprojekte im R D-Umfeld und treibst unsere Innovationen erfolgreich voran.Du führst ein interdisziplinäres Projektteam aus Wissenschaftler:innen, Techniker:innen und Produktspezialist:innen. Du triffst mit der Unterstützung deines Teams fundierte technische Entscheidungen für dein Projekt. Du verantwortest Termine, Ressourcen und Budgets innerhalb deiner Projekte. Du koordinierst sowohl dein internes Projektteam als auch die Zusammenarbeit mit externen Entwicklungspartnern. Du stellst eine proaktive und transparente Kommunikation mit internen und externen Stakeholdern sicher. Du präsentierst regelmässig den Projektfortschritt und schaffst Klarheit über Ziele, Risiken und nächste Schritte. Bei Bedarf bringst du dich auch operativ in die Entwicklung ein, z. B. in den Bereichen Messprinzipien, Elektronik, Mechanik oder Firmware. Das bringst du mit : Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Studium in den Naturwissenschaften (z. B. Physik, Chemie, Biotechnologie), im Maschinenbau, in der Elektrotechnik oder in einem vergleichbaren Bereich. Du verfügst über ein breites technisches Verständnis, idealerweise mit Berührungspunkten zur Elektronik-Entwicklung und zu Themen der Konnektivität. Du bringst eine ausgeprägte Affinität zur Softwareentwicklung mit oder hast erste Erfahrungen mit kundenspezifischen Softwarelösungen. Du begeisterst dich für technische Herausforderungen und gehst diese mit einer pragmatischen, lösungsorientierten Hands-on-Mentalität an. Du kommunizierst sicher schriftlich und mündlich auf Deutsch und Englisch und fühlst dich auch in einem internationalen Umfeld wohl. Erfahrungen im Ausland sind dabei ein Plus. Du kannst komplexe technische Inhalte verständlich vermitteln und deine Kommunikation flexibel an unterschiedliche Zielgruppen anpassen. Insieme al tuo team sarai responsabile dell'implementazione di successo dei nostri progetti di innovazione dall'idea iniziale fino alla disponibilità sul mercato. Conduci progetti impegnativi di sviluppo prodotto nell'ambiente di ricerca e porti avanti con successo le nostre innovazioni. Conduci un team di progetto interdisciplinare composto da scienziati, tecnici e specialisti di prodotto. Con il supporto del tuo team, prendi decisioni tecniche valide per il tuo progetto. Sei responsabile delle scadenze, delle risorse e dei budget all'interno dei tuoi progetti. Coordini sia il tuo team di progetto interno che la collaborazione con partner di sviluppo esterni. Garantisci una comunicazione proattiva e trasparente con le parti interessate interne ed esterne. Presenti regolarmente i progressi del progetto e fai chiarezza su obiettivi, rischi e passaggi successivi. Se necessario, sarai coinvolto anche operativamente nello sviluppo, ad es. B. nei settori dei principi di misurazione, dell'elettronica, della meccanica o del firmware. Hai un'ampia conoscenza tecnica, idealmente con contatti con lo sviluppo dell'elettronica e problemi di connettività. Hai una forte affinità con lo sviluppo di software o hai esperienza iniziale con soluzioni software specifiche per il cliente. Sei entusiasta delle sfide tecniche e le affronti con una mentalità pragmatica, orientata alla soluzione e pratica. Comunichi con sicurezza per iscritto e oralmente in tedesco e inglese e ti senti a tuo agio anche in un ambiente internazionale. L'esperienza all'estero costituisce un plus. Potete trasmettere contenuti tecnici complessi in modo comprensibile e adattare in modo flessibile la vostra comunicazione a diversi gruppi target. descriptionByLocale.en: True to the vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", the Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative pioneer when it comes to ventilators, automated pipetting and storage of samples, and the development of process sensors. The Process Analytics business unit develops, produces and sells state-of-the-art process measurement technology for customers in biopharma, chemicals and breweries. Our product portfolio includes sensors for critical process parameters such as pH value, oxygen, or sensors for measuring cell density, which are extremely important in biological processes and unique worldwide with their innovative technology. This is what you can do: In your role in project management, you will be at the center of interdisciplinary teams from research development, process development and product management. Together with your team, you will be responsible for the successful implementation of our innovation projects from the initial idea to market readiness. You lead demanding product development projects in the R D environment and successfully drive our innovations forward. You lead an interdisciplinary project team made up of scientists, technicians and product specialists. With the support of your team, you make sound technical decisions for your project. You are responsible for deadlines, resources and budgets within your projects. You coordinate both your internal project team and the collaboration with external development partners. You ensure proactive and transparent communication with internal and external stakeholders. You regularly present project progress and create clarity about goals, risks and next steps. If necessary, you will also be involved operationally in development, e.g. B. in the areas of measuring principles, electronics, mechanics or firmware. What you bring with you: You have a degree in the natural sciences (e.g. physics, chemistry, biotechnology), mechanical engineering, electrical engineering or a comparable field. You have a broad technical understanding, ideally with contact with electronics development and connectivity issues. You have a strong affinity for software development or have initial experience with customer-specific software solutions. You are enthusiastic about technical challenges and approach them with a pragmatic, solution-oriented, hands-on mentality. You communicate confidently in writing and orally in German and English and also feel comfortable in an international environment. Experience abroad is a plus. You can convey complex technical content in an understandable manner and flexibly adapt your communication to different target groups. You are characterized by a high degree of personal responsibility and understand how to motivate, coordinate and work together in teams, for example

Vous dirigez des projets de développement de produits exigeants dans l’environnement de R D et faites avancer avec succès nos innovations. Vous dirigez une équipe de projet interdisciplinaire composée de scientifiques, de techniciens et de spécialistes produits. Avec le soutien de votre équipe, vous prenez des décisions techniques judicieuses pour votre projet. Vous êtes responsable des délais, des ressources et des budgets de vos projets. Vous coordonnez à la fois votre équipe de projet interne et la collaboration avec les partenaires de développement externes. Vous assurez une communication proactive et transparente avec les parties prenantes internes et externes. Vous présentez régulièrement l’avancement du projet et clarifiez les objectifs, les risques et les prochaines étapes. Si nécessaire, vous serez également impliqué de manière opérationnelle dans le développement, par ex. B. dans les domaines des principes de mesure, de l'électronique, de la mécanique ou du firmware. Ce que vous apportez : Vous êtes titulaire d'un diplôme en sciences naturelles (par exemple physique, chimie, biotechnologie), en génie mécanique, en génie électrique ou dans un domaine comparable. Vous avez une large compréhension technique, idéalement en contact avec les problèmes de développement électronique et de connectivité. Vous avez une forte affinité pour le développement de logiciels ou avez une première expérience avec des solutions logicielles spécifiques aux clients. Vous êtes enthousiasmé par les défis techniques et les abordez avec une mentalité pragmatique, orientée vers les solutions et pratique. We are an innovative leader in the field of ventilators, automated pipetting, and sample storage, as well as the development of process sensors. Additionally, we produce robots for the storage of biological samples at -80 degrees Celsius, used in biobanks for clinical research purposes. ## Responsibilities - Development and implementation of merchandise and procurement strategies - Identification, selection, and development of national and international suppliers - Conducting supplier evaluations, audits, and qualifications - Leading price, contract, and condition negotiations - Closing framework agreements and long-term supply agreements - Analysis of procurement markets and identification of cost optimization potentials - Conducting Make-or-Buy analyses - Supporting product development projects through Early Supplier Involvement - Building and maintaining strategic supplier partnerships - Executing the operational ordering process in the ERP system - Ensuring timely material availability for production and projects - Monitoring delivery deadlines and order confirmations - Coordination with production, logistics, quality assurance, and engineering - Support for claims and supplier escalations - Maintenance of article, supplier, and contract master data - Support for customs and trade legal requirements in international procurement ## Requirements - Education: Completed degree in Business Administration, Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain Management, or equivalent qualification; or commercial or technical training with further education in procurement or Supply Chain Management - Professional experience: Multi-year experience in strategic and operational procurement, preferably in an industrial context, experience in international supplier management, experience in contract negotiations and supplier development - Technical skills: Solid knowledge in procurement and supplier management, experience with ERP systems (e.g., SAP), knowledge of international trade and customs law, knowledge of relevant regulations (REACH, RoHS, Supply Chain Act); descriptionByLocale.en: ## Description In line with our vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", the Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative leader in the field of ventilators, automated pipetting, and sample storage, as well as the development of process sensors. Our Process Analytics business unit develops, produces, and distributes the most advanced process measurement technology for customers in biopharma, chemistry, and brewing. Our product portfolio includes sensors for critical process parameters such as pH, oxygen, or sensors for measuring cell density, unique in their kind thanks to their innovative technology. ## Responsibilities - Development of optical systems and definition of measurement principles - Creation of functional patterns and prototypes - Development of measurement algorithms and creation of analytical and statistical models based on experimental data, as well as their visualization - Simulation of physical phenomena in sensors such as optics, heat transfer, diffusion, and flow - Simulation and validation in laboratory and field tests - Collaboration with internal and external knowledge carriers and knowledge transfer in interdisciplinary projects - Introduction of ideas for new products, technologies, and research for potential external partners - Leadership of technology projects with a focus on optics and data science ## Requirements - Completed degree in Physics, Photonics, or a natural science field, preferably with a doctorate and/or many years of professional experience in sensor development - Good theoretical knowledge and practical experience in physics, preferably with a focus on optics, optoelectronics, or optical measurement techniques - Practical knowledge in optical simulations (e.g., Zemax), physical simulations (e.g., COMSOL), and signal processing is desirable - Model development with suitable tools / programming knowledge (Python, C/C++, MATLAB, R, etc.) is an advantage - Hands-on mentality: skill and creativity in experimental work and experience in planning, setting up, conducting, and analyzing experiments - Self-initiative, independent, structured, and result-oriented work - Good communication and presentation of technical matters - Communicative and team-oriented personality - Solid German and English skills in both spoken and written form ## What We Offer - A motivating work environment - Various leisure offers - Modern working conditions - A "Du" culture promotes open communication and a pleasant interaction - Space for innovative ideas ## Contact Learn more about career opportunities at Hamilton at jobs.hamilton.ch.

descriptionByLocale.en: True to the vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", the Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative pioneer when it comes to ventilators, automated pipetting and storage of samples, and the development of process sensors. The Process Analytics business unit develops, produces and sells state-of-the-art process measurement technology for customers in biopharma, chemicals and breweries. Our product portfolio includes sensors for critical process parameters such as pH value, oxygen, or sensors for measuring cell density, which are extremely important in biological processes and unique worldwide with their innovative technology. This is what you can do: We offer our customers in the biotech, pharmaceutical and process industries as well as in research innovative measurement solutions for their complex processes, such as the production of vaccines. As a developer, you will work within the “Electronics and Firmware” group in our development department. You will be involved in the development and maintenance of innovative sensor technologies for process measurement technology. You work in dynamic project teams made up of specialists from various disciplines, where you represent the electronics hardware sector. Your main tasks include: Development of electronic concepts Development of hardware in interdisciplinary project teams Schematic and layout of electronic hardware with CAE software Creation of test concepts and test specifications Creation of EMC test plans incl. descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione In linea con la visione "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", le aziende Hamilton forniscono soluzioni per l'industria sanitaria dal 1950. Siamo innovatori leader nel campo dei respiratori, dell'automatizzazione del pipettaggio e del deposito di campioni, nonché nello sviluppo di sensori di processo. L'unità di business Process Analytics sviluppa, produce e distribuisce le più avanzate tecnologie di misurazione di processo per clienti nel settore biotecnologico, chimico e della birra. La nostra gamma di prodotti include sensori per parametri di processo critici come il pH, l'ossigeno, o sensori per la misurazione della densità cellulare, unici e innovativi a livello mondiale per i processi biologici. Puoi contribuire in questo modo: Offriamo ai nostri clienti nel settore biotecnologico, farmaceutico e dei processi, nonché nella ricerca, soluzioni di misurazione innovative per i loro processi complessi, ad esempio la produzione di vaccini. Come sviluppatore, lavorerai nel gruppo "Electronics and Firmware" del nostro dipartimento di sviluppo. Ti occuperai dello sviluppo e della manutenzione di innovative tecnologie di sensori per la misurazione di processo. Lavorerai in dinamici team di progetto composti da specialisti di vari settori, rappresentando il settore elettronica firmware. ## Mansioni - Sviluppo di concetti di firmware - Sviluppo di firmware in team interdisciplinari - Programmazione e debug di firmware con software di sviluppo integrato - Collaborazione a concetti e specifiche di test - Applicazione di programmi di test integrati per unit-test e analisi del codice - Introduzione in servizio e test di prototipi e serie zero - Collaborazione a modifiche di firmware di prodotti esistenti - Creazione della documentazione completa ## Requisiti - Laurea in Ingegneria Elettrica con specializzazione in Sistemi Embedded - Esperienza professionale di molti anni nello sviluppo di prodotti industriali - Esperienza professionale di molti anni con controller Cortex e AVR - Conoscenze del linguaggio di programmazione C - Conoscenze di un sistema operativo RTOS - Preferibilmente esperienza nel settore delle interfacce di comunicazione industriali (HART, Modbus RTU, PROFINET, ecc.) - Esperienza nella programmazione e nell'esecuzione di sequenze di test per test automatizzati (NI TestStand e/o Python) - Lavoro autonomo, strutturato e orientato alla soluzione - Pensiero analitico - Personalità comunicativa, creativa e team-oriented - Buone conoscenze di tedesco e inglese in parola e scrittura ## Cosa offriamo - Ambiente di lavoro motivante - Vari offerte di tempo libero - Condizioni di lavoro moderne - Una cultura "Du" che promuove una comunicazione aperta e un ambiente gradevole ## Contatto Scopri di più sulle opportunità di carriera presso Hamilton su jobs.hamilton.ch. descriptionByLocale.en: ## Description In line with our vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative leader in ventilators, automated pipetting, and sample storage, as well as in the development of process sensors. The Process Analytics business unit develops, produces, and distributes the latest process measurement technology for customers in the biopharma, chemical, and brewing industries. Our product portfolio includes sensors for critical process parameters such as pH, oxygen, or sensors for measuring cell density, which are uniquely innovative and important in biological processes worldwide. You can make a difference: We offer our customers in the biotech, pharmaceutical, and process industries, as well as in research, innovative measurement solutions for their complex processes, for example, the production of vaccines. As a developer, you will work within the "Electronics and Firmware" group of our development department. You will be involved in the development and maintenance of innovative sensor technologies for process measurement. You will work in dynamic project teams consisting of specialists from various disciplines, representing the electronics firmware area. ## Responsibilities - Development of firmware concepts - Development of firmware in interdisciplinary project teams - Programming and debugging of firmware with integrated development software - Collaboration on test concepts and test specifications - Application of integrated test programs for unit tests and code analyses - Commissioning and testing of prototypes and zero series - Collaboration on firmware adaptations of existing products - Creation of complete documentation ## Requirements - Completed degree in Electrical Engineering with a focus on Embedded Systems - Several years of professional experience in industrial product development - Several years of professional experience with Cortex and AVR controllers - Knowledge of the programming language C - Knowledge of an RTOS operating system - Preferably experience in the field of industrial communication interfaces (HART, Modbus RTU, PROFINET, etc.) - Experience in programming and executing test sequences for automated tests (NI TestStand and/or Python) - Autonomous, structured, and solution-oriented work - Analytical thinking - Communicative, creative, and team-oriented personality - Good German and English skills in word and writing ## What we offer - Motivating work environment - Various leisure offers - Modern working conditions - A "Du" culture that promotes open communication and a pleasant atmosphere ## Contact Find out more about career opportunities at Hamilton at jobs.hamilton.ch. If you share our values and feel at home in a collegial and grounded environment, join our family!
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description En ligne avec notre vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", les entreprises Hamilton fournissent des solutions pour l'industrie de la santé depuis 1950. Nous sommes un leader innovant dans les ventilateurs, l'automatisation du pipettage et le stockage des échantillons, ainsi que dans le développement de capteurs de processus. L'unité d'affaires Process Analytics développe, produit et distribue les dernières technologies de mesure de processus pour les clients dans les secteurs biopharma, chimique et brassicole. Notre portefeuille de produits comprend des capteurs pour les paramètres de processus critiques tels que le pH, l'oxygène, ou des capteurs pour la mesure de la densité cellulaire, uniques et innovants à l'échelle mondiale pour les processus biologiques. Vous pouvez faire une différence : Nous offrons à nos clients dans les secteurs biotech, pharmaceutique et des processus, ainsi qu'à la recherche, des solutions de mesure innovantes pour leurs processus complexes, par exemple, la production de vaccins. En tant que développeur, vous travaillerez dans le groupe "Electronics and Firmware" de notre département de développement. Vous serez impliqué dans le développement et la maintenance de technologies de capteurs innovantes pour la mesure de processus. Vous travaillerez dans des équipes de projet dynamiques composées de spécialistes de diverses disciplines, représentant le domaine électronique firmware. ## Responsabilités - Développement de concepts de firmware - Développement de firmware dans des équipes de projet interdisciplinaires - Programmation et débogage de firmware avec des logiciels de développement intégrés - Collaboration sur les concepts et spécifications de test - Application de programmes de test intégrés pour les tests unitaires et les analyses de code - Mise en service et test de prototypes et de séries zéro - Collaboration sur les adaptations de firmware de produits existants - Création de la documentation complète ## Exigences - Diplôme en Ingénierie Électrique avec une spécialisation en Systèmes Embarqués - Plusieurs années d'expérience professionnelle dans le développement de produits industriels - Plusieurs années d'expérience professionnelle avec des contrôleurs Cortex et AVR - Connaissances du langage de programmation C - Connaissances d'un système d'exploitation RTOS - Préférablement expérience dans le domaine des interfaces de communication industrielles (HART, Modbus RTU, PROFINET, etc.) - Expérience en programmation et en exécution de séquences de test pour des tests automatisés (NI TestStand et/ou Python) - Travail autonome, structuré et orienté vers la solution - Pensée analytique - Personnalité communicative, créative et orientée équipe - Bonnes compétences en allemand et en anglais en parole et en écriture ## Ce que nous offrons - Environnement de travail motivant - Diverses offres de loisirs - Conditions de travail modernes - Une culture "Du" qui favorise une communication ouverte et un environnement agréable ## Contact En savoir plus sur les opportunités de carrière chez Hamilton sur jobs.hamilton.ch. Si vous partagez nos valeurs et vous sentez à votre aise dans un environnement collectif et ancré, rejoignez notre famille!

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione In linea con la visione "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", le aziende Hamilton forniscono soluzioni per l'industria sanitaria dal 1950. Siamo innovatori leader nel campo dei dispositivi di ventilazione, dell'automatizzazione del pipettaggio e della conservazione delle prove, nonché nello sviluppo di sensori di processo. L'unità operativa Produzione fabbrica componenti per tutte le aziende Hamilton, dai componenti per l'iniezione a quelli per il handling dei liquidi e ai componenti metallici e in plastica. Il nostro obiettivo è produrre il maggior numero possibile di componenti in-house, rimanendo agili, indipendenti ed efficienti. Questo è ciò che puoi fare: - Coordinare più progetti operativi e produttivi per garantire gli obiettivi strategici complessivi - Pianificare e dirigere autonomamente progetti LEAN di grandi dimensioni in produzione e logistica - Gestire attivamente i rischi e le escalation in stretta collaborazione con stakeholder interni ed esterni - Controllare proattivamente i progetti e fornire report trasparenti per garantire l'adozione degli obiettivi di progetto in termini di qualità, costi, risorse, documentazione e rispetto dei tempi - Garantire il rispetto di tutte le normative, regolamenti e linee guida pertinenti, nonché la protezione della proprietà intellettuale - Accompagnare e supportare attivamente i processi di cambiamento all'interno dell'organizzazione Questo è ciò che porti: - Formazione tecnica completata, ingegneria o qualifiche/esperienze comparabili - Formazione LEAN (o Lean Six Sigma) o esperienza professionale dimostrabile - Conoscenza sicura dei metodi e degli strumenti di gestione dei progetti (classici, agili, ibridi) - Eccellenti capacità analitiche e concettuali, forte capacità di strutturazione e priorità - Affinità per l'automatizzazione dei processi, la digitalizzazione e l'IA nella produzione - Eccellente competenza di comunicazione e moderazione (tedesco e inglese), affidabile, determinato e capace di prendere decisioni - Eccellenti conoscenze di tedesco e inglese, sia scritto che parlato, minimo C1 Scopri di più sulle opportunità di carriera presso Hamilton su jobs.hamilton.ch. Se condividi i nostri valori e ti senti a casa in un ambiente collettivo e radicato, presso Hamilton offriamo non solo un ambiente di lavoro motivante, ma anche diverse offerte di tempo libero e condizioni di lavoro moderne. La nostra cultura Du promuove una comunicazione aperta e un buon rapporto tra i colleghi. Diventa parte di un team in cui le tue competenze sono apprezzate e c'è spazio per idee innovative. Interessato? Per ulteriori domande, contattaci a jobs@hamilton.ch e forniscici i seguenti dettagli: - Riferimento: JR-5560-fjb - Contatto: Lina Hosang Le candidature per posta o via email non possono essere considerate.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Description In line with the vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative leader in ventilator devices, automated pipetting, and sample storage, as well as process sensor development. The Operations business unit produces parts for all Hamilton companies, from injection molding parts to pipette tips for liquid handling and metal and plastic parts. Our goal is to produce as many parts in-house as possible, remaining agile, independent, and efficient. This is what you can do: - Coordinate multiple top-level projects in the operational and productive environment to ensure strategic overall goals - Independently plan and lead extensive LEAN projects in production and logistics - Actively manage risks and escalations in close coordination with internal and external stakeholders - Proactively control projects and provide transparent reporting to ensure the achievement of project goals in terms of quality, costs, resources, documentation, and timeliness - Ensure compliance with all relevant legal requirements, standards, and guidelines, as well as protection of intellectual property - Actively accompany and support change processes within the organization This is what you bring: - Completed technical training, engineering or comparable qualifications/experiences - LEAN training (or Lean Six Sigma) or demonstrable professional experience - Secure handling of project management methods and tools (classic, agile, hybrid) - Very good analytical and conceptual skills, strong structuring and prioritization ability - Affinity for process automation, digitalization, and AI in production - Well-developed communication and moderation skills (German and English), reliable, assertive, and decision-making - Very good German and English skills in both written and spoken form, at least C1 Find out more about career opportunities at Hamilton on jobs.hamilton.ch. If you share our values and feel at home in a collegial and grounded environment, at Hamilton we offer not only a motivating work environment, but also various leisure activities and modern working conditions. Our Du culture promotes open communication and pleasant interaction. Become part of a team in which your competencies are appreciated and space is created for innovative ideas. Interested? For further inquiries, please contact us at jobs@hamilton.ch and provide us with the following details: - Reference: JR-5560-fjb - Contact: Lina Hosang Applications by post or email cannot be considered.
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description En ligne avec la vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", les entreprises Hamilton fournissent des solutions pour l'industrie de la santé depuis 1950. Nous sommes un leader innovant dans les dispositifs de ventilation, le pipettage automatisé, le stockage des échantillons et le développement de capteurs de processus. L'unité opérationnelle Production fabrique des pièces pour toutes les entreprises Hamilton, des pièces d'injection jusqu'aux pointes de pipette pour le traitement des liquides et les pièces métalliques et en plastique. Notre objectif est de produire autant de pièces que possible en interne, tout en restant agile, indépendant et efficace. Voici ce que vous pouvez faire : - Coordonner plusieurs projets de haut niveau dans un environnement opérationnel et productif pour assurer les objectifs stratégiques globaux - Planifier et diriger de manière autonome des projets LEAN étendus en production et en logistique - Gérer activement les risques et les escalades en étroite coordination avec les parties prenantes internes et externes - Contrôler proactivement les projets et fournir des rapports transparents pour assurer la réalisation des objectifs de projet en termes de qualité, de coûts, de ressources, de documentation et de ponctualité - Assurer le respect de toutes les exigences légales, normes et lignes directrices pertinentes, ainsi que la protection de la propriété intellectuelle - Accompagner et soutenir activement les processus de changement au sein de l'organisation Voici ce que vous apportez : - Formation technique terminée, ingénierie ou qualifications/expériences comparables - Formation LEAN (ou Lean Six Sigma) ou expérience professionnelle démontrée - Maîtrise des méthodes et des outils de gestion de projet (classiques, agiles, hybrides) - Excellentes compétences analytiques et conceptuelles, forte capacité de structuration et de priorisation - Affinité pour l'automatisation des processus, la numérisation et l'IA dans la production - Excellentes compétences en communication et en modération (allemand et anglais), fiable, déterminé et capable de prendre des décisions - Excellentes compétences en allemand et en anglais, à la fois écrites et parlées, au moins C1 Découvrez-en plus sur les opportunités de carrière chez Hamilton sur jobs.hamilton.ch. Si vous partagez nos valeurs et vous sentez à l'aise dans un environnement collégial et ancré, chez Hamilton, nous offrons non seulement un environnement de travail motivant, mais aussi diverses activités de loisirs et des conditions de travail modernes. Notre culture Du favorise une communication ouverte et une interaction agréable. Rejoignez une équipe dans laquelle vos compétences sont appréciées et où l'on crée de l'espace pour des idées innovantes. Intéressé ? Pour toute question supplémentaire, veuillez nous contacter à jobs@hamilton.ch et nous fournir les détails suivants : - Référence : JR-5560-fjb - Contact : Lina Hosang Les candidatures par courrier ou par email ne peuvent pas être prises en compte.

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione In linea con la visione "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", le aziende Hamilton forniscono soluzioni per l'industria sanitaria dal 1950. Siamo innovatori nel campo dei dispositivi di ventilazione, dell'automatizzazione del pipettaggio e del deposito delle prove, nonché nello sviluppo di sensori di processo. Come parte dell'unità di business Shared Services (SHS) della Hamilton Bonaduz AG, questo settore svolge compiti centrali per le aziende Hamilton. I team di HR, ICT, Corporate Communication, Facilities e Finance garantiscono che i processi funzionino senza intoppi e che i dipendenti siano supportati ottimamente a livello globale. Questo è ciò che puoi fare: - Funzione come punto di riferimento centrale per tutte le questioni di sicurezza e salute nell'azienda – in stretta collaborazione con i dipartimenti interni e i partner, autorità e uffici esterni - Implementazione autonoma della direttiva EKAS 6508 inclusa la supervisione continua, lo sviluppo e la garanzia della conformità - Consulenza autonoma dei dirigenti e dei dipendenti su tutte le questioni di sicurezza sul lavoro e protezione della salute – la tua esperienza tecnica sarà attivamente richiesta e integrata nei processi decisionali - Pianificazione, coordinamento e attuazione di tutte le attività rilevanti per la salute e la sicurezza – strutturate, proattive e in linea con i tempi - Analisi autonoma delle statistiche degli incidenti e degli eventi, analisi delle cause, sviluppo e attuazione di misure preventive efficaci per rafforzare in modo sostenibile la cultura della sicurezza - Organizzazione, esecuzione e post-esame di audit interni, ispezioni e controlli nel campo della sicurezza sul lavoro – inclusa la derivazione, la priorità e il monitoraggio delle misure di miglioramento - Creazione di analisi fondate dei rischi e delle minacce per i posti di lavoro, le impiantazioni e le sostanze pericolose, tenendo conto delle attuali normative legali, normative e aziendali - Sviluppo continuo autonomo dello standard di sicurezza attraverso la gestione sistematica delle misure con un chiaro focus sulla prevenzione e l'efficacia - Manutenzione, sviluppo e assicurazione della qualità della documentazione rilevante per la sicurezza – strutturata, tracciabile e revisione sicura - Monitoraggio del corretto stoccaggio e della gestione delle sostanze pericolose secondo le normative legali
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Description In line with the vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", the Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are innovators in the field of ventilation devices, automated pipetting, and sample storage, as well as the development of process sensors. As part of the Shared Services (SHS) business unit of Hamilton Bonaduz AG, this department performs central tasks for the Hamilton companies. Teams in HR, ICT, Corporate Communication, Facilities, and Finance ensure that processes run smoothly and that employees are optimally supported worldwide. This is what you can do: - Function as a central point of contact for all safety and health issues in the company – in close exchange with internal departments and external partners, authorities, and offices - Autonomous implementation of the EKAS directive 6508 including continuous monitoring, development, and ensuring compliance - Autonomous advice of management and employees on all issues of occupational safety and health protection – your technical expertise will be actively sought and integrated into decision-making processes - Holistic planning, coordination, and implementation of all health- and safety-relevant activities – structured, forward-looking, and timely - Autonomous analysis of accident and event statistics, cause analysis, and development and implementation of effective preventive measures to sustainably strengthen safety culture - Organization, conduct, and follow-up of internal audits, inspections, and controls in the field of occupational safety – including derivation, prioritization, and tracking of improvement measures - Creation of well-founded risk and hazard analyses for workplaces, facilities, and hazardous substances taking into account current legal, regulatory, and company requirements - Continuous autonomous development of the safety standard through systematic measure management with a clear focus on prevention and effectiveness - Maintenance, development, and quality assurance of safety-relevant documentation – structured, traceable, and revision-safe - Monitoring of the correct storage and handling of hazardous substances according to legal requirements

jobs.title: Electrical Engineer im Product Care 80 - 100 % (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Getreu der Vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives" liefern die Hamilton Unternehmen seit 1950 Lösungen für die Gesundheitsbranche. Wir sind ein innovativer Vorreiter was Beatmungsgeräte, das automatisierte Pipettieren und Lagern von Proben sowie die Entwicklung von Prozesssensoren anbelangt. Die Business Unit Process Analytics entwickelt, produziert und vertreibt modernste Prozessmesstechnik für Kunden in Biopharma, Chemie und Brauereien. descriptionByLocale.it: Fedeli alla visione "Guidiamo l'innovazione per migliorare la vita delle persone", le aziende Hamilton forniscono soluzioni per il settore sanitario dal 1950. descriptionByLocale.en: True to the vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", the Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative pioneer when it comes to ventilators, automated pipetting and storage of samples, and the development of process sensors. Hamilton Storage develops, produces and sells robots for storing up to ten million chemical substances for pharmaceutical companies. We also produce robots for storing biological samples at -80 degrees Celsius, which are used in biobanks for clinical research purposes. This is what you can do: As a refrigeration technician, you are responsible for ensuring that Hamilton storage systems keep customer products stable in the temperature range from -80°C to + 30°C. To achieve this, you will be responsible for the following: Repair and maintenance operations for our international customers Planning the deployment of third-party companies for our customers Monitoring and evaluating the work carried out by third-party companies based on contracts and work reports Renewing contracts with third-party companies Monitoring and maintaining our refrigerant storage Creating, monitoring and maintaining the status overview of our refrigeration systems in the field Responsible for the maintenance of our systems based on local regulations relating to refrigeration Technology Creating and processing customer complaints in the appropriate manner CSM Software This is what you bring with you: You will also bring your specialist knowledge and the experience you gain in the field to the development department so that our products become even better. You enjoy dealing directly with customers. You have training as a refrigeration system technician EFZ incl. appropriate certificates or the willingness to obtain them in order to be able to procure and transport refrigerants You are certified to handle refrigerants and you have already gained experience in field service on industrial refrigeration systems You like the challenge, complex leak detection and soldering work in hard-to-reach places don't scare you You are familiar with the regulations in the various European countries (e.g. F-Gases Regulation EU No. 517/2014) You enjoy traveling, but you also enjoy working at the headquarters in Domat/Ems with colleagues from various disciplines (e.g. technical service, engineering, production, project management) You communicate confidently in German and English, as our team is multinational You have a driver's license for PW Your place of work is in Graubünden (Domat/Ems). descriptionByLocale.fr: Fidèles à la vision « Nous encourageons l'innovation pour améliorer la vie des gens », les sociétés de Hamilton fournissent des solutions au secteur de la santé depuis 1950. Hamilton Storage développe, produit et vend des robots permettant de stocker jusqu'à dix millions de substances chimiques pour les entreprises pharmaceutiques. descriptionByLocale.en: ## Description In line with our vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative leader in ventilator devices, automated pipetting, and sample storage, as well as process sensor development. The Operations business unit produces parts for all Hamilton companies, from injection molding parts to liquid handling tips, and metal and plastic components. Our goal is to produce as many parts in-house as possible, remaining agile, independent, and efficient. This is what you can do: - Mechanical and electrical assembly and testing of complex assembly groups and instruments in the laboratory automation sector - Commissioning and parameterization of assembled units according to technical specifications - Conducting quality-relevant intermediate and final inspections to ensure functionality and quality standards - Ensuring process flows according to specifications to maintain production standards - ESD-compliant assembly according to electrostatic protection regulations - Documentation and reporting of test results to optimize work processes and ensure traceability - Error analysis and technical problem-solving during assembly and testing - Collaboration with the development department to continuously improve product quality and assembly efficiency This is what you bring: - Completed technical basic training, preferably in the mechanical, electrical, or mechatronic field - Years of experience in precise assembly and commissioning of assembly groups, instruments, or automated systems - Very high computer competence and routine in handling software-supported assembly, testing, and documentation processes - Well-developed holistic and networked thinking and an entrepreneurial approach - Precise, efficient, and autonomous work with a very high quality consciousness - Good comprehension and ability to quickly understand complex technical relationships - Very good German language skills in writing and speaking as well as good English language skills - Ability to perform assembly work that requires long standing and occasional lifting of components - Team-oriented, responsible, and reliable personality Find out more about career opportunities at Hamilton on jobs.hamilton.ch. descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description En ligne avec notre vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", les entreprises Hamilton fournissent des solutions pour l'industrie de la santé depuis 1950. Nous sommes un leader innovant dans les dispositifs de ventilation, le pipettage automatisé et le stockage des échantillons, ainsi que dans le développement de capteurs de processus. L'unité opérationnelle Production fabrique des pièces pour toutes les entreprises Hamilton, des pièces d'injection jusqu'aux pointes de manipulation de liquides et aux composants métalliques et en plastique. Notre objectif est de produire autant de pièces que possible en interne, restant ainsi agile, indépendant et efficace. Voici ce que vous pouvez faire : - Assemblage mécanique et électrique et test de groupes d'assemblage et d'instruments complexes dans le secteur de l'automatisation des laboratoires - Mise en service et paramétrage des unités assemblées selon les spécifications techniques - Réalisation d'inspections intermédiaires et finales pertinentes pour la qualité afin de garantir la fonctionnalité et les normes de qualité - Assurer les flux de processus selon les spécifications pour maintenir les normes de production - Assemblage conforme aux normes ESD selon les réglementations de protection électrostatique - Documentation et rapport des résultats des tests pour optimiser les processus de travail et garantir la traçabilité - Analyse des erreurs et résolution des problèmes techniques pendant l'assemblage et le test - Collaboration avec le département de développement pour améliorer continuellement la qualité du produit et l'efficacité de l'assemblage Voici ce que vous apportez : - Formation technique de base terminée, de préférence dans le domaine mécanique, électrique ou mechatronique - Années d'expérience dans l'assemblage précis et la mise en service de groupes d'assemblage, d'instruments ou de systèmes automatisés - Très grande compétence informatique et routine dans la gestion des processus d'assemblage, de test et de documentation assistés par logiciels - Pensée holistique et réseau bien développée et approche entrepreneuriale - jobs.title: Application Specialist Chemie/Biochemie 80 - 100 % (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Getreu der Vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives" liefern die Hamilton Unternehmen seit 1950 Lösungen für die Gesundheitsbranche. Wir sind ein innovativer Vorreiter was Beatmungsgeräte, das automatisierte Pipettieren und Lagern von Proben sowie die Entwicklung von Prozesssensoren anbelangt. Die Business Unit Process Analytics entwickelt, produziert und vertreibt modernste Prozessmesstechnik für Kunden in Biopharma, Chemie und Brauereien. Unser Produktportfolio umfasst Sensoren für kritische Prozessparameter wie den pH-Wert, Sauerstoff, oder auch Sensoren zur Messung der Zelldichte, wie sie in biologischen Prozessen enorm wichtig und mit ihrer innovativen Technologie weltweit einzigartig sind. Das kannst du bewirken : Fachliche Unterstützung der Verkaufsorganisation und der Kunden. Ziel ist der Aufbau und die Sicherstellung einer nachhaltigen Kundenbindung, mit dem Fokus auf der Sicherung und dem Ausbau des Umsatzpotenzials. Dazu gehört auch das Erkennen und Bewerten von Markttrends sowie das Einbringen relevanter Erkenntnisse in Richtung Product Management zur Prüfung und Weiterverfolgung. Hauptaufgaben Ist Ansprechpartner für die Kunden und Verkaufsorganisation zur erfolgreichen Integration unserer Produkte im Kundenprozess, bei applikativen Fragestellungen sowie einfachen technischen Anfragen. Plant und führt Produktvorführungen/-präsentationen wie Teststellungen, in Absprache mit dem zuständigen Verkaufsleiter, bei den Kunden selbstständig aus. Gibt Rückmeldung über die Erkenntnisse der Teststellungen, Kundenbesuche an den zuständigen Verkaufsleiter und legt eine transparente Dokumentation dazu zentral ab. Bringt die Erkenntnisse der Teststellungen, Kundenbesuche, Trends im Markt usw., wo nötig und sinnvoll, konstruktiv wie auch selbständig beim Produktmanagement ein. Nebenaufgaben Ist mitverantwortlich für die zeitnahe Beantwortung und Koordination der zentral eingehenden Kunden E-Mails und Anrufe. Dazu gehört auch das Erstellen und Bearbeitung der Fälle (Cases) und RMAs im Beanstandungsmanagementsystem (ServiceNow CSM). Stellt eine kundenorientierte und gleichzeitig wirtschaftlich Beurteilung von Kundenbeanstandungen wie die dazugehörigen zufriedenstellenden nachhaltigen Lösungen an den Kunden sicher. Wo nötigt, werden Kollegen des Technical Support Teams und/oder Field Service Support involviert. Interdisziplinäre Organisation der Kundenseminare, Webinar Trainings und Schulungen für die Kunden sowie Service- und Verkaufsorganisation, und wirkt wo nötig selbst aktiv mit. Vertritt die Kolleg:innen aus dem Application Support Team bei deren Abwesenheit Die beschriebenen Tätigkeiten sehen eine hohe Reisetätigkeit vor. Das bringst du mit : Abgeschlossene Ausbildung und vorzugsweise weiterführendes Studium im Bereich Chemie oder Biochemie auf Stufe HF, TS, Bachelor, Master oder ähnlich Idealerweise mehrjährige Berufserfahrung im industriellen Umfeld der Prozessindustrie, bestenfalls in der Chemie-, Pharma- oder Nahrungsmittelbranc

descriptionByLocale.it: Fedeli alla visione "Guidiamo l'innovazione per migliorare la vita delle persone", le aziende Hamilton forniscono soluzioni per il settore sanitario dal 1950. Siamo pionieri innovativi quando si tratta di ventilatori, pipettaggio e conservazione automatizzati di campioni e sviluppo di sensori di processo. La business unit Process Analytics sviluppa, produce e vende tecnologie di misurazione di processo all'avanguardia per clienti del settore biofarmaceutico, chimico e dei birrifici. Il nostro portafoglio di prodotti comprende sensori per parametri di processo critici come valore pH, ossigeno o sensori per la misurazione della densità cellulare, che sono estremamente importanti nei processi biologici e unici al mondo con la loro tecnologia innovativa. Questo è ciò che puoi ottenere: Supporto tecnico all'organizzazione commerciale e ai clienti. L’obiettivo è costruire e garantire una fidelizzazione sostenibile dei clienti, con particolare attenzione alla garanzia e all’espansione del potenziale di vendita. Ciò include anche il riconoscimento e la valutazione delle tendenze del mercato e la presentazione dei risultati rilevanti alla gestione del prodotto per la revisione e il follow-up. Compiti principali È la persona di contatto per i clienti e l'organizzazione di vendita per la corretta integrazione dei nostri prodotti nel processo del cliente, per domande relative all'applicazione e semplici richieste tecniche. Pianifica ed esegue dimostrazioni/presentazioni di prodotti come test eseguiti in modo indipendente ai clienti in consultazione con il responsabile delle vendite. Fornisce un feedback sui risultati delle posizioni di prova e delle visite dei clienti al responsabile delle vendite responsabile e archivia la documentazione trasparente a livello centrale. Contribuisce con i risultati dei test, delle visite ai clienti, delle tendenze del mercato, ecc., ove necessario e utile, in modo costruttivo e indipendente alla gestione del prodotto. Compiti aggiuntivi È corresponsabile della risposta tempestiva e del coordinamento delle e-mail e delle chiamate in arrivo dei clienti. Ciò include anche la creazione e l'elaborazione di casi e RMA nel sistema di gestione dei reclami (ServiceNow CSM). Garantisce una valutazione orientata al cliente e allo stesso tempo economica dei reclami dei clienti e delle relative soluzioni sostenibili e soddisfacenti per il cliente. Ove necessario, vengono coinvolti i colleghi del team di supporto tecnico e/o del supporto di assistenza sul campo. Organizzazione interdisciplinare di seminari per i clienti, webinar di formazione e istruzione per i clienti, nonché organizzazione di assistenza e vendita, con partecipazione attiva ove necessario. Rappresenta i colleghi dell'Application Support Team in loro assenza. Le attività descritte comportano molti viaggi. Cosa porti con te: Formazione completata e preferibilmente ulteriori studi nel campo della chimica o biochimica a livello HF, TS, Bachelor, Master o simili. Idealmente, diversi anni di esperienza professionale nell'ambiente industriale dell'industria di processo, idealmente nell'industria chimica, farmaceutica o alimentare
descriptionByLocale.en: True to the vision "We drive innovation to improve people's lives", the Hamilton companies have been providing solutions for the healthcare industry since 1950. We are an innovative pioneer when it comes to ventilators, automated pipetting and storage of samples, and the development of process sensors. The Process Analytics business unit develops, produces and sells state-of-the-art process measurement technology for customers in biopharma, chemicals and breweries. Our product portfolio includes sensors for critical process parameters such as pH value, oxygen, or sensors for measuring cell density, which are extremely important in biological processes and unique worldwide with their innovative technology. This is what you can achieve: Technical support for the sales organization and customers. The goal is to build and ensure sustainable customer loyalty, with a focus on securing and expanding sales potential. This also includes recognizing and evaluating market trends and bringing relevant findings to product management for review and follow-up. Main tasks Is the contact person for the customers and sales organization for the successful integration of our products in the customer process, for application-related questions and simple technical inquiries. Plans and carries out product demonstrations/presentations such as test runs independently to customers in consultation with the responsible sales manager. Gives feedback on the findings of the test positions and customer visits to the responsible sales manager and stores transparent documentation centrally. Contributes the findings from testing, customer visits, trends in the market, etc., where necessary and useful, constructively and independently to product management. Additional tasks Is jointly responsible for the timely response and coordination of incoming customer emails and calls. This also includes creating and processing cases and RMAs in the complaints management system (ServiceNow CSM). Ensures a customer-oriented and at the same time economical assessment of customer complaints and the associated satisfactory sustainable solutions to the customer. Where necessary, colleagues from the Technical Support Team and/or Field Service Support are involved. Interdisciplinary organization of customer seminars, webinar training and education for customers as well as service and sales organization, and actively participates where necessary. Represents the colleagues from the Application Support Team in their absence. The activities described involve a lot of travel. What you bring with you: Completed training and preferably further studies in the field of chemistry or biochemistry at the level of HF, TS, Bachelor, Master or similar. Ideally, several years of professional experience in the industrial environment of the process industry, ideally in the chemical, pharmaceutical or food industries
descriptionByLocale.fr: Fidèles à la vision « Nous encourageons l'innovation pour améliorer la vie des gens », les sociétés de Hamilton fournissent des solutions au secteur de la santé depuis 1950. Nous sommes un pionnier de l'innovation en matière de ventilateurs, de pipetage et de stockage automatisés d'échantillons, ainsi que de développement de capteurs de processus. L'unité commerciale Process Analytics développe, produit et vend une technologie de mesure de processus de pointe pour les clients des secteurs biopharmaceutique, chimique et brassicole. Notre gamme de produits comprend des capteurs pour les paramètres de processus critiques tels que la valeur du pH, l'oxygène ou des capteurs pour mesurer la densité cellulaire, qui sont extrêmement importants dans les processus biologiques et uniques au monde grâce à leur technologie innovante. Voici ce que vous pouvez réaliser : Support technique pour l’organisation commerciale et les clients. L’objectif est de fidéliser et d’assurer une fidélité durable des clients, en mettant l’accent sur la sécurisation et l’expansion du potentiel de vente. Cela inclut également la reconnaissance et l'évaluation des tendances du marché et la transmission des conclusions pertinentes à la gestion des produits pour examen et suivi. Tâches principales Est l'interlocuteur des clients et de l'organisation commerciale pour l'intégration réussie de nos produits dans le processus client, pour les questions liées aux applications et les demandes techniques simples. Planifie et réalise des démonstrations/présentations de produits telles que des tests de manière indépendante auprès des clients en consultation avec le directeur commercial responsable. Donne des commentaires sur les résultats des postes de test et des visites de clients au directeur commercial responsable et stocke de manière centralisée une documentation transparente. Contribue aux résultats des tests, des visites de clients, des tendances du marché, etc., lorsque cela est nécessaire et utile, de manière constructive et indépendante à la gestion des produits. Tâches supplémentaires Est conjointement responsable de la réponse et de la coordination en temps opportun des courriels et des appels entrants des clients. Cela inclut également la création et le traitement des dossiers et des RMA dans le système de gestion des réclamations (ServiceNow CSM). Assure une évaluation à la fois orientée client et économique des réclamations des clients et des solutions durables satisfaisantes associées pour le client. Si nécessaire, des collègues de l’équipe d’assistance technique et/ou du service d’assistance sur site sont impliqués. Organisation interdisciplinaire de séminaires clients, de formations et d'éducation par webinaires pour les clients ainsi que de l'organisation du service et des ventes, et participation active si nécessaire. Représente les collègues de l’équipe de support applicatif en leur absence. Les activités décrites impliquent beaucoup de déplacements. Ce que vous apportez : Une formation terminée et de préférence des études complémentaires dans le domaine de la chimie ou de la biochimie au niveau HF, TS, Bachelor, Master ou similaire. Idéalement, plusieurs années d'expérience professionnelle dans le milieu industriel de l'industrie de transformation, idéalement dans les industries chimiques, pharmaceutiques ou agroalimentaires
